title: Monumental Dive
description: Everything about Ocean Monuments. Changes textures for Guardians and Blocks
body:
**It works for all versions!** (it has the red thing it always has but dont worry about that) -*Also they made me pick one version so I just picked the copper age.

This pack **changes the textures of the Guardian**s from Minecraft.

Giving them cleaner textures as well as giving the **Elder Guardian a pixel consistent texture**.

**Changes Prismarine to look better**.
